headline: Assessing Lennox International (LII) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Event overview and immediate context Lennox International (LII) has attracted fresh investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock down about 2% over the past week and 2% over the past month, while remaining positive over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Lennox International. At a share price of $517.47, Lennox International has seen short term pressure, with a 7 day share price return of a 9.21% decline and a 30 day share price return of a 2.36% decline. Its...
